projects.title: MONIKA
projects.description: Monika navigates a strange and oversized city, accompanied by a keyboard she seems unable to part with. As her journey unfolds, she is faced with a decision that may redefine her connection to the past.
projects.credits: DIRECTED, WRITTEN AND EDITED BY Carmen Moreno, Carlos Didier, Sara Echeverri STARRING Monika JIA PRODUCED BY Velar

projects.title: MAGIC IS BA&SH
projects.description: Creative direction of the Ba&sh Noël 2025 campaign, where the brand’s signature red aesthetic spreads across Paris through gift machines, television screens and urban installations.

projects.title: I KEPT MY NAME
projects.description: A visual essay reflecting on transformation and permanence. As memories, matter, and experiences are replaced, what survives the passage of time?
projects.credits: DIRECTED, WRITTEN AND EDITED BY Carmen Moreno & Carlos Didier STARRING Marina Obba

projects.title: LA FAUTE DES AUTRES
projects.description: La Faute des Autres is a hybrid short film set in a dystopian future where nature has taken control of humankind. Blurring fiction and document, it imagines a world where humans are no longer in charge.
projects.credits: Directed by Sara Echeverri and Carmen Moreno.

projects.title: NIA
projects.description: Character design of a futuristic warrior.
